write a letter to principal for taking 2 days leave

Okay, here’s a draft of a letter to the principal requesting two days of leave:

[Your Name]
[Your Class/Roll Number]
[Date]

The Principal
[School Name]
[School Address]

Subject: Leave Application

Respected Madam/Sir,

I am writing to request a leave of absence from school for two days, from [Start Date] to [End Date]. [Briefly state reason for leave – e.g., due to a family matter/personal reasons].

I will ensure that I catch up on any missed work and assignments upon my return.

Thank you for your consideration.

Sincerely,
[Your Name]
